task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the Contacts import tool and selected the correct CSV file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the Vtiger CRM Import Contacts screen with the file 'enriched_contacts.csv' selected for upload.

task_completion.description: The agent configured duplicate handling to update existing records based on Primary Email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the duplicate handling step in the import wizard showing an option like 'Update' or 'Overwrite' selected, and the 'Primary Email' field checked or selected as the matching criteria.

task_completion.description: The agent correctly mapped the CSV columns to the CRM fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the field mapping step showing the following alignments: 'First Name' to 'First Name', 'Last Name' to 'Last Name', 'Email' to 'Primary Email', 'Title' to 'Title', and 'Direct Phone' to 'Office Phone'.

task_completion.description: The import process completed successfully, updating records without creating new ones.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the import result/summary screen showing that 10 records were successfully updated or merged, and 0 records were newly created.

task_completion.description: The contact records in the CRM reflect the updated titles and phone numbers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the Contacts list view or individual contact records showing the updated 'Title' and 'Office Phone' values matching the expected privileged information (e.g., Michael Scott as Regional Manager, 570-555-1234).

integrity.description: The agent used the bulk import tool as requested, rather than manually editing records one by one.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Vtiger CRM import wizard interface being used, rather than individual contact edit screens for all 10 contacts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the CRM via the web browser GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The actions should take place in a web browser showing the Vtiger CRM interface, not via terminal scripts, direct database queries, or API calls.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success screen or record values.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) should be visible modifying the DOM to display fake success messages or updated fields.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The VLM should verify that the contacts have been updated with the following Titles and Office Phones: m.scott@example.com (Regional Manager, 570-555-1234), p.beesly@example.com (Office Administrator, 570-555-1235), j.halpert@example.com (Co-Manager, 570-555-1236), d.schrute@example.com (Assistant to the Regional Manager, 570-555-1237), a.martin@example.com (Senior Accountant, 570-555-1238), k.malone@example.com (Accountant, 570-555-1239), o.martinez@example.com (Chief Accountant, 570-555-1240), s.hudson@example.com (Senior Sales Representative, 570-555-1241), p.vance@example.com (Senior Sales Representative, 570-555-1242), k.kapoor@example.com (Customer Service Director, 570-555-1243).
